evidence: standards/enterprise/swift-6-concurrency.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: A synchronization primitive may replace actor isolation only when its ownership and await-safety invariant is explicit; UI mutation remains MainActor-isolated.
statement: Swift code MUST compile under Swift 6 complete strict concurrency, every mutable state boundary MUST declare its isolation or synchronization owner, and UI or presentation-store mutation MUST occur on MainActor.
